rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §12.1166, which governs charter school related-party transaction disclosures. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The commissioner shall adopt a rule defining "related party" for purposes of this subchapter.
_note: No conflict; the rule text concerns charter school related-party transactions, not property tax homestead exemptions.
